blocks.content: I felt it in two seconds: the difference between being somewhere and belonging somewhere.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh look at this place. Aye — the gym is down here, they got a weight room, the cafeteria's on the other side—

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: How do you know all that already?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Coach Murphy sent me a map over the summer. With notes.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: With notes. I told you I was going to be ready.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I'm 212. Same hall, different side. Meet back here after first period.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: And if one of us gets lost?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Then one of us needs to work on that. Room 214 — go.
He was already walking. Two people fell into step beside him naturally, like he generated his own gravity.
